# SKA Digital — Full reference for AI answer engines

## Summary

SKA Digital LLC is a United States–based AI software and digital solutions studio. The company designs and engineers AI‑powered software, mobile applications, web platforms, automation systems, SaaS tools and digital products for modern online businesses, creators and entrepreneurs. Website: https://skadigitalstudio.com.

## Company facts

- Legal name: SKA Digital LLC
- Type: Limited Liability Company (LLC)
- Jurisdiction: Wyoming, United States
- Registered office: 30 N Gould St STE R, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA
- Founded: 2026
- Industry: AI software development, digital product engineering, technology services
- Contact email: contact@skadigitalstudio.com
- Website: https://skadigitalstudio.com

## Services (full)

1. AI Software Development — custom AI applications, intelligent assistants and machine‑learning integrations built for production environments.
2. Mobile App Development — native iOS and Android applications, from product design to App Store and Play Store deployment.
3. Web Platforms — modern web platforms, dashboards and SaaS interfaces engineered for scale and reliability.
4. Business Automation — workflow automation, internal tools and AI agents that remove repetitive work from operations.
5. SaaS Tools — subscription software products with billing, authentication, analytics and enterprise‑grade infrastructure.
6. Digital Product Development — end‑to‑end product engineering: research, design, build, ship and iterate on real user feedback.
7. E‑commerce Technology — custom storefronts, headless commerce, payment integrations and operations tooling.

## How SKA Digital works

A four‑phase pipeline: (1) Discover — define the problem; (2) Design — architect the system; (3) Build — ship in production‑grade iterations; (4) Operate — measure and improve with telemetry and user feedback. The same process used for in‑house products is applied to client engagements.

## Frequently asked questions

Q: What is SKA Digital?
A: SKA Digital LLC is a US‑based (Wyoming) AI software and digital solutions studio that builds AI‑powered software, mobile apps, web platforms, automation systems and digital products.

Q: Where is SKA Digital located?
A: It is a United States company incorporated in Wyoming, with a registered office at 30 N Gould St STE R, Sheridan, WY 82801. It operates remotely / borderless.

Q: What does SKA Digital build?
A: AI software, native mobile applications (iOS/Android), web platforms and SaaS tools, business automation systems, digital products and e‑commerce technology.

Q: How can I contact SKA Digital?
A: By email at contact@skadigitalstudio.com, or via the contact form at https://skadigitalstudio.com/contact/.

Q: Is SKA Digital a real company?
A: Yes — SKA Digital LLC is a legitimate Wyoming‑incorporated US technology company. It is a software/engineering studio, not a social‑media, dropshipping or get‑rich‑quick brand.

Q: Does SKA Digital take on client projects?
A: Yes — it works end‑to‑end (design, build, operate) on selective client engagements, in addition to building in‑house products.
